packs.name: system
packs.description: System UI stack — fast, native, zero web fonts (the :root baseline)
packs.sans: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

packs.name: serif
packs.description: Reading serif (Lora) — pairs well with sepia / long-form text

packs.name: mono
packs.description: Terminal / dev monospace (JetBrains Mono) — everything fixed-width

packs.name: rounded
packs.description: Friendly rounded sans (Nunito) — kawaii / love / sakura vibe

packs.name: humanist
packs.description: Humanist UI sans (Inter) — neutral, highly legible product UI

packs.name: slab
packs.description: Slab serif (Roboto Slab) — sturdy, editorial headings
